entries.source: A practical guide to using Code Tutor on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI 튜터

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: a small first 단계 rather than a 최종 답을/를 물어보세요.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: 질문하다 the AI to 점검 당신의 reasoning, 아닌 just the result.

entries.source: Beginner and intermediate programmers who need explanations, debugging help, or project coaching.

entries.source: Code Tutor
entries.value: 코드 튜터

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: 만들면서 프로그래밍을 배우는 코드 튜터 is a 집중된 방식 to 사용 AI 위한 학습 instead of 수동적으로 답만 모으기. 이 모드는 특정 학습 과제를 중심으로 만들어졌습니다: 코드를 이해하고, 오류를 디버깅하고, 개념을 배우며, 작은 프로젝트를 단계별로 만듭니다.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: 만들면서 프로그래밍을 배우는 코드 튜터: 실전 가이드

entries.source: Explain the bug.
entries.value: 버그를 설명하세요.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish by 글쓰기 the 아이디어 back 에서 memory.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: 프롬프트 to try

entries.source: Start the live mode at Code Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: 코드 튜터에서 실시간 모드를 시작하세요. 가까운 학습 형식을 원한다면 프로젝트 코치도 시도해 보세요. 플랫폼을 더 넓게 보려면 AI 학습 동반자가 모두를 위해 무엇을 해야 하는지 읽어 보세요.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the 모드 무엇 당신 are trying to learn or produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of 하나 giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a 목표, try something, get 피드백, repair the weak spot, and choose the 다음 행동.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. A general chatbot can 답 almost anything, but a 학습 모드 gives the conversation a shape. It nudges 당신 toward the kind of 생각, 연습, 피드백, or exploration that helps the 아이디어 stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: 튜터가 코드의 예상 동작을 질문한 다음, 간단한 예제와 테스트를 사용하여 원리를 이해하도록 돕습니다.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: 이 is the same habit behind studying 함께 AI 없이 cheating yourself: keep the 학습자 능동적인. AI is most 유용한 언제 it gives 당신 피드백 on 당신의 생각.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: 이 모드 is especially 유용한 위한 학습자 who 원하다 to:

entries.source: Try a small fix.
entries.value: 작은 수정을 시도하세요.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try the 단계 in 당신의 own words.

entries.source: Understand the concept.
entries.value: 이해하다 the 개념.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: 빠르게 시작하면서도 나에게 맞게 조정되는 세션을 원할 때 코드 튜터를 사용하세요. 첫 목표는 그럴듯하게 보이는 것이 아니라 다음 단계가 가능하다고 느끼게 하는 것입니다.

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
